treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Offline and online experiments with mental-imagery tasks (left motor imagery, mental subtraction, tongue motor imagery)
treatment_information.treatment_response: Online classification accuracy of 87.5% achieved with left-hand motor imagery and mental subtraction tasks

treatment_timeline.event: First visit: neurological assessment and auditory oddball test
Second visit: offline experiment with mental-imagery tasks
Third visit: online experiment with real-time feedback

patient_outcome.final_status: Unable to participate in follow-up experiments due to worsened physical status
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: No evidence of consciousness or alertness found in follow-up assessment
